flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Eastern Oregon University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.7k → $11.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Eastern Oregon University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.4k → $25.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Oregon University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Oregon University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (38.2% → 43.0%).
